Complete the levels of each puzzle by covering every corridor and corner with beautifully bright paint. It feels so satisfying, who doesn't love a clean coat of fresh paint?

- Unique and fun puzzles levels
- Smooth and satisfying ball-rolling action.

In this game you get to shoot cannons, destroy castles and watch it all fall down! All from the safe space of your own mobile device.

Tap to aim horizontally, tap again to aim vertically and the cannon will shoot by itself.

100% satisfaction guaranteed! 100% historically accurate! *

SUBSCRIPTION PRICING AND TERMS

Subscription options

In our game we have the following subscription offer:

Weekly VIP Membership offers weekly subscription for $7.99 after 3-day free trial which unlocks extra coins, 2x free continues every day, 3x free skins, and removes all forced ads.

End of trial period and subscription renewal

This price is established for United States customers. Pricing in other countries may vary and actual charges may be converted to your local currency depending on the country of residence.

Payment will be charged to your iTunes Account at confirmation of purchase.

Subscription automatically renews unless auto-renew is turned off at least 24-hours before the end of the current period.

Account will be charged for renewal within 24-hours prior to the end of the current period, and identify the cost of the renewal.

Subscriptions may be managed by the user and auto-renewal may be turned off by going to the user’s Account Settings after purchase.

Any unused portion of a free trial period, if offered, will be forfeited when the user purchases a subscription to that publication, where applicable.


Canceling trial period or subscription

You can turn off the auto-renew for the subscription whenever you want in the settings if your iTunes account. Check https://support.apple.com/HT202039.

When your current trial/subscription period expires, you will be unsubscribed. The current active subscription period cannot be canceled.

apps.name: Jewels Planet  - Match 3 Game
apps.description:
Welcome to the ULTIMATE match-3 puzzle game! Play hundreds of levels, solve addictive puzzles with colorful jewels!

Jewels Planet is FREE and no internet is required! Challenge yourself by playing 700+ levels and discover a new mode in every new world!
Play this jewel game anywhere and anytime without limits and be a jewel legend player in this jewel saga game! So what are you waiting for? Swap the gems and start the jewel quest adventure NOW!

HOW TO PLAY

- Swap & Match 3 or more jewels to crush them.
- Matching 4 gems will create a lightning jewel. A lightning jewel can blast a whole column or row!
- Matching 5+ jewels will create new special jewels with new effects!
- Swap 2 special jewels to create even bigger effect!
- Follow the goal to win the level!
- Collect coins by wining the levels and earn new power-up!


JEWELS PLANET MATCH 3 GAME FEATURES
-Unique & fun gameplay: Outstanding design, swap and match the jewels and move on in your quest journey.

-Complete tons of challenging and fun match-3 levels and unlock new worlds!

-Gifts & Chests: The more stars you collect by completing levels the more amazing rewards you win!

-A lot of unique boosters and power-ups to help you solve puzzles and send you away to the next level!

-Daily Events: Daily bonuses, gifts, Challenges, and much more fun surprises!

-No internet or Wi-Fi connection required to play!

apps.description:
Dunking,  ankle breakers, crossovers, and all the cool stuff you enjoy at your fingertip!

Dribble hoops is the first person basketball experience you were waiting for.

HOW TO PLAY:
 + Drag your finger to move.
 + Release to jump, Tap to shoot.
 + Tap inside the dunking zone to dunk.
 + Tap in the right spot to Power Dunk!
 + Score high and level up your skills.

Dribble hoops starts easy so anyone can play,
and master all the skills.
The AI evolves overtime so be ready for a
challenge.

Check out all the bonus levels for even more fun:

... and cool new features are added all the time!
Get it now and have fun !!!

- Move your way up the rank
- Get new belts by increasing your rank
- Unlimited fun! 

Enjoy!

Welcome to Plantopia! 

The very first merge game where you can grow your own Dream Garden, and learn how to make organic products out of the plants you grow.

MERGE & UNLOCK MULTIPLE BOARDS
Explore  the greenhouse, toolshed and DIY Flower Factory, with more than 500 beautiful objects to be found.

GROW & NURTURE UNIQUE PLANTS

EXPAND AND DECORATE YOUR GARDEN
Expand your gardening business, earn cash, grow your dream garden.

advisories: Infrequent/Mild Alcohol, Tobacco, or Drug Use or References
apps.description:
Become the richest cinema entrepreneur!

Build your own business, earn money, and become the best cinema tycoon in the world!

Start with a small room and turn it into a major cinema business. 
Let the customers chose their movies.


If you like idle and tapping games, you will enjoy this casual cinema management game. Cinema Tycoon is an easy-to-play game where you run your own business with different departments. Make important management decisions to build your empire and transform your small cinema into one of the greatest in the world!
apps.subtitle: Create your own cinemas!

Fun yet realistic physics game. Shoot wisely in this western-themed game, time your shots to aim and shoot down your opponent.

Unlock all the weapons and become the most feared gunslinger in town!

Have fun!

apps.name: Cannon It!
advisories: Infrequent/Mild Alcohol, Tobacco, or Drug Use or References
apps.description:
Aim, Fire, and Watch the destruction! Real physics based demolition of medieval castles. Earn coins, upgrade your cannon and cause more destruction.
Are you ready?

Key features:
- Handcrafted buildings and levels
- Full, real physics based demolition of buildings
- Forests, mountains, snow-land, spooky forest and desert environments
- Upgrade your arsenal (8 visually different cannons and 6 balls)

apps.subtitle: Shoot & Destroy!

apps.name: Food Pop!
apps.description:
Love to cook? Dream of owning your own restaurant? Have what it takes to be the ultimate restaurant tycoon? Now you can with Food Pop, a unique match and merge restaurant builder unlike anything you have seen before.

Serve the endless masses of regulars and VIPs that show up to dine at your fine establishment. Fill their orders and keep them happy to build your fortune. Reinvest your profits by improving your restaurant. Upgrade your menu by hiring chefs and expand your kitchen to fill new and more profitable orders.
In Food Pop the kitchen never closes and customers always pay.

Let's get cooking!

EXCITING COOKING ACTION
- Fill orders as customers line-up at your door.
- Merge ingredients to make better and more profitable dishes.

GROW YOUR RESTAURANT
- Build up your restaurant from the ground up.
- Hire chefs to unlock new ingredients and recipes.
- Expand your menu and grow your profits by upgrading your kitchen.
apps.subtitle: Merge food & Build your diner!

apps.name: Blast League
apps.description:
In a world where bouncing balls have taken over. (Really? balls have taken over the world? Okay, sure.) There is but one way to take back our planet - blast them to smithereens! 

Blast League is a fun vertical shooter where you blast your way through deadly bouncing balls. You’ll compete against other Blast players from around the world in weekly leagues to earn amazing rewards. Level-up your stats, collect unique gear, and unlock special abilities to take your ball blasting power to the next level.

POWER-UP
- Level up your attack, speed and even money earn per ball destroyed.

COLLECT & CUSTOMIZE
- Unlock, collect, and equip a huge variety of gear all themed around fun pop-culture references.
- Each item has unique bonuses to improve your power.

BECOME THE LEAGUE CHAMPION
- Compete with other players from around the world.
- Win valuable rewards at top ranks.
- Climb the Weekly Leagues for even more valuable rewards in higher divisions.

Get your blaster, gear-up and get ready - the balls are coming for you.
apps.subtitle: Shoot, Win, Power-up, Repeat!

apps.name: Bubble Buster 2048
apps.description:
Welcome to a bubble blasting 2048 puzzle odyssey like never before! Shoot and merge the balls to win! Drop the balls to match numbers and colors, solving puzzles as you go. 
  
 Featuring new puzzles, challenges, and obstacles on every level, this 2048 game is more entertaining than ever before. 
  
 How to play: 
 • Swipe and aim the ball!
 • Shoot and hit the ball with the same color and number!
 • Merge them all to reach the target!
 • Smash barrels and boxes to complete the levels! 
  
 Watch out, the balls bounce around just like in real life! 
  
 Features:
 • Complete goals and win stars on every level.
 • Win Star Chests and get great rewards.
 • Aim and shoot balls to destroy obstacles in your way. 
 • Use dynamite, rockets, and other boosters to level up.
  
 Combining a classic game with an original twist, this is a unique 2048 odyssey! Can you shoot, drop, and smash your way to victory by merging all the balls? 
  
 Ready for the challenge? Download now to start playing! Gotta merge'em all to win!
 
 Drop balls and merge them! Craft mighty powers and use them wisely pass each level!
apps.subtitle: Merge & match balls to win!

apps.name: Ball Pop!
apps.description:
GET READY TO POP SOME BALLS!
Ball Popping has never been easier. Just swipe to aim and release to drop the ball. Let gravity take control and watch the combo points add up. 
Your ball will bounce, ricochet, explode and vaporize anything in its way. Play through hundreds of unique levels and perfect your ball popping prowess!

FEATURES:
- Shoot your ball and perform daring trick shots
- Break up balls with devastating combos
- Power-up your next shot to release carnage below
- Hundreds of levels of pure ball popping pleasure
apps.subtitle: Drop & Pop Some Balls!

apps.name: Slime Heroes
apps.description:
Your tower is under siege! Legions of ooey-gooey slimes are bouncing their way to destroy your precious tower. Luckily for you it is literally a downhill battle.
Strategically aim and send your heroes running down to smack, bounce, and ricochet off slimes, trees, rocks and whatever else is in the way. Slay the slimes before they reach your tower to earn stars and awesome rewards. Defeat the Slime King for a big bonus!
Slime Heroes features:
·        Unlockable Heroes with unique slime slaying powers
·        Power-ups to improve your tower and heroes
·        Tons of levels to challenge you to keep your tower slime free
·        Slimes. Lots and lots of slimes.
No actual slimes were harmed in the making of this highly addictive slime slaying experience.
